evals.prompt: /code-review-and-quality Review the staged authentication module changes
evals.expected_output: copilot.js runs successfully, .claude/review-state.json created with prompt='Review the staged authentication module changes', iteration=1, active=true, max_iterations=5 (default), banner printed

assertions.name: state_prompt_correct
assertions.description: state.prompt equals 'Review the staged authentication module changes'

assertions.name: banner_printed
assertions.description: stdout contains '🔍 Code Review Loop activated!'

evals.prompt: /code-review-and-quality Review staged changes for security vulnerabilities --max-iterations 3 --model claude-opus-4-5
evals.expected_output: copilot.js runs with max_iterations=3, model=claude-opus-4-5, prompt='Review staged changes for security vulnerabilities', state file created with these exact values

assertions.name: state_prompt_stops_before_flags
assertions.description: state.prompt equals 'Review staged changes for security vulnerabilities' (not including --max-iterations or --model)

evals.expected_output: copilot.js exits with error message indicating a prompt is required, no state file created

assertions.name: error_message_shown
assertions.description: stderr contains error indicating prompt is required

assertions.name: no_state_file_created
assertions.description: .claude/review-state.json is NOT created (or script exits with non-zero code)
